prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: chapter poster. Story world: Dead Channel Protocol. Premise: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.. Setting: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Threat presence: Root Administrator. Recurring motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Arc focus: Contact and Contradiction (OPENING). Summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller. Tone: GROUNDED. Arc focus: Contact and Contradiction (OPENING). Summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Immediate scene brief: Dead Channel Protocol - Contact and Contradiction Arc Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
